content: A 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory can be structurally organized around the three progressive stages of Three-Stage Progressive Reinforcement Learning, where each memory slot is tagged with a stage-specific readiness score that lets the agent proactively query only high-readiness new information for each stage. This curricula-aligned active memory system eliminates the redundant data querying that plagues current unstructured active memory architectures for curiosity-driven agents.
